case_title: DOROTHY ROBY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBY, DOROTHY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-19-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-20-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-04-2011
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBY, DOROTHY
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-05-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR RONALD P. SCHNEIDER.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-06-2011 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-05-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBY, DOROTHY SERVED MAY-18-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-24-2011. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-06-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. AUG-19-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-03-2011.
ARBITRATOR CHARLENE PHYLLIS ROSACK APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-04-2011 THROUGH FEB-02-2012.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-06-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SOLOMON, MICHAEL R SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR ROBY, DOROTHY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JUL-05-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE - ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-06-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-05-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH MAY-02-2012. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON MAR-06-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
